params.name: Stela of Djet
params.description:
On Aug 6, 3000 BC, this relief from the First Dynasty of Ancient Egypt was created.

This is a simple stela. There is an eagle engraved at the top, some pillars in the rectangular space below that seem to represent the palace, and a snake on the top part of the pillar. The refined craftsmanship of this Stela of Djet reflected the idea of ancient totem worship. The image of this relief is extremely concise and reflects the earlier design of hieroglyphs. It symbolizes kingship and governance. An i …
